title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
